overall.description: Gameplay footage from GTA V showing a first-person walk through a sunny Los Santos neighborhood. The player walks along sidewalks past a construction site, crosses a busy intersection with moderate traffic, and continues through a residential area with palm trees and suburban homes, with the downtown skyline visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: suburban sidewalk next to construction site

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk next to a blue construction barrier

entered.detail: tall blue plywood construction barrier with chain link fencing on top
metal chain link fence running parallel to the sidewalk
tall palm trees lining the street with green fronds
single-story white suburban house with gray roof
wooden utility poles with multiple power lines crossing the street
distant cluster of modern glass skyscrapers visible on the horizon

segments.scene_description: The segment begins on a sunny suburban sidewalk next to a construction site marked by blue barriers. The camera walks steadily forward past palm trees and utility poles, with a white suburban house visible across the street and the downtown skyline looming in the distance.

events.description: exits covered sidewalk area and approaches the open intersection
dark sedan drives through the intersection from right to left

agents.ego_description: approaching and entering the crosswalk to cross the intersection

notable_agents.action: dark sedan driving through the intersection perpendicular to camera path
person in red shirt walking on the opposite sidewalk approaching the intersection

entered.detail: large commercial billboard with 'Rebel Radio' advertisement mounted on metal frame
painted white crosswalk lines on asphalt marking the pedestrian crossing
tall metal pole with traffic signals and street light arm

segments.scene_description: The scene opens up into a wide intersection as the camera approaches the crosswalk. A large billboard becomes visible on the left while vehicles including a dark sedan pass through the intersection. A pedestrian appears on the opposite sidewalk as the camera prepares to cross.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy intersection with downtown skyline view

events.description: classic brown muscle car drives past the camera through the intersection
camera slows slightly while approaching the opposite curb

agents.ego_description: continuing across the intersection toward the residential side while observing passing traffic

notable_agents.action: classic brown muscle car with white stripes driving through the crosswalk area
white van waiting at the intersection for traffic to clear

entered.detail: single-story gray suburban house with brick driveway and palm tree in front yard
standard metal mailbox on wooden post at the curb
black trash bins with bags placed on the sidewalk near the curb

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through the center of the intersection as various vehicles including a classic muscle car pass by. The downtown skyline becomes more prominent in the background while suburban houses with mailboxes and trash bins come into view on the approaching sidewalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: suburban residential sidewalk with palm trees

events.description: steps onto the opposite sidewalk leaving the intersection behind
camera tilts upward to look at the palm tree canopy against the sky

agents.ego_description: walking along the residential sidewalk passing houses and looking up at palm trees

notable_agents.action: group of three pedestrians walking toward the camera on the sidewalk

entered.detail: curved driveway paved with red bricks leading to a garage
wooden telephone pole with transformer and multiple wire connections

segments.scene_description: The camera exits the intersection onto a quiet residential sidewalk lined with gray houses and brick driveways. After passing a group of pedestrians, the camera tilts upward to view the palm tree canopy against the bright blue sky, ending the clip.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person walk through a sunny suburban neighborhood that transitions from a construction zone into a busy urban intersection and finally into a quiet residential street. It begins on a sidewalk beside blue construction barriers, moving steadily past palm trees and utility poles with the distant downtown skyline looming ahead. As the camera approaches a wide intersection, the view opens up to reveal a large billboard and passing traffic, including a dark sedan, before the camera crosses the street. The scene then shifts through the center of the intersection past a classic muscle car, bringing suburban houses with mailboxes and trash bins into closer focus. Finally, the camera exits the intersection onto a sidewalk lined with gray houses and brick driveways, passing a group of pedestrians before tilting upward toward the palm tree canopy against a bright blue sky.
